'''Romin''' were a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with a somewhat smaller stature than that of [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. Romin had golden skin and [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Their [[Nose/Legends|noses]] were flat, barely raised on their faces, and their [[Mouth/Legends|mouths]] were wide and expressive.

The Romin hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Romin]] and were divided into two classes. The ruling class was the minority of Romin who had wealth and status. The majority of the Romin were of the working class who lived in poverty and took up homes in vast shanty towns that were set up outside the richer [[City/Legends|cities]]. The rampant disease and decay that dominated the ghettos of Romin gave the working class a much shorter lifespan, with many of their children not reaching their second birthdays.

The Romin were ruled by a single dictator who went by the title of Great Leader. The Great Leader during the final days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] was [[Roy Teda]], who became infamous for hiding [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] criminals on the planet for substantial bribes collected by his "charity" [[Hansel|deputy]].
